Protara prices public offering at $6.25/share, pre-funded warrants at $6.249/share; expects $100M gross proceeds.
news.summary: Protara Therapeutics, Inc. announced the pricing of its underwritten public offering of 13,690,000 shares of common stock at $6.25 per share and pre-funded warrants to purchase 2,325,372 shares at $6.249 per warrant. Additionally, the underwriters have a 30-day option to buy up to 2,402,305 additional shares. The gross proceeds from the offering are expected to be around $100 million. The offering is set to close on December 11, 2024. The funds will be used for the clinical development of TARA-002 and other programs, as well as for working capital and general corporate purposes.

Technology investor Anand Chandrasekaran joins Celesta Capital as Managing Partner, bringing over 20 years of experience.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 9, 2024, Celesta Capital, a prominent global venture capital firm focusing on deep tech, revealed that Anand Chandrasekaran, an established technology investor and product leader, has assumed the role of Managing Partner. With over two decades of experience in the field, Chandrasekaran's appointment marks a significant addition to the firm's leadership.

Ethereum researcher Max Resnick moves to Solana due to scaling concerns, shifts focus to base layer.
news.summary: In recent months, Max Resnick has grown more vocal about his dissatisfaction with Ethereum's layer 2 scaling strategy. Resnick argues that Ethereum should have prioritized scaling at the base layer, similar to Solana's approach.

news.headline: BitMEX to introduce MOVEUSDT perpetual swap with 50x leverage, users can long or short MOVE token.
news.summary: BitMEX will introduce MOVEUSDT perpetual swaps with leverage of up to 50x, providing users with the opportunity to speculate on the price movements of MOVE, the token of Movement.

news.headline: NAHQ wins Modern Healthcare's 'Best in Business' Awards and CEO Stephanie Mercado named in '100 Most Influential Leaders'.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Chicago, the National Association for Healthcare Quality (NAHQ) revealed the recipients of two esteemed awards within the healthcare industry. Serving as the leading organization for healthcare Quality & Safety, NAHQ views these awards as significant achievements in the field.

news.headline: South Korea's ruling party in last negotiations with opposition on budget: Yonhap
onsemi is acquiring Silicon Carbide JFET tech from Qorvo for $115M to enhance its power portfolio for AI Data Centers.
news.summary: A company headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, onsemi (Nasdaq: ON) revealed its acquisition deal to take over the Silicon Carbide Junction Field-Effect Transistor (SiC JFET) technology business, along with the United Silicon Carbide subsidiary, from Qorvo for $115 million in cash. This strategic move aims to enhance onsemi’s EliteSiC power portfolio, catering to the demand for increased energy efficiency and power density in the AC-DC stage of power supply units.

news.headline: Bitcoin's profit metric drops by 76% post $100,000 hype, leading to less abrupt tumbles, say analysts.
news.summary: The daily realized profit metric of Bitcoin has dropped by 76% following the decline in interest regarding the possibility of Bitcoin reaching $100,000. This information comes from analysts within the cryptocurrency industry.

Jinxin Technology Holding closes US$5 million IPO, offering 1,250,000 American Depositary Shares on Nasdaq.
news.summary: In Shanghai, China, on December 9, 2024, Jinxin Technology Holding Company, a cutting-edge digital content service provider in China, shared the completion of its initial public offering on Nasdaq under the symbol NAMI. A total of 1,250,000 American Depositary Shares were issued during this offering.

news.headline: OVERTAKE GameFest debuts Somnis: Rumble Rush Quest on Immutable (IMX), allowing players to earn rewards with strategic gaming. Explore play-to-earn!

news.headline: Clari named a 2024 Deloitte Technology Fast 500™ Winner, recognized as one of North America’s fastest-growing tech companies.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Clari, a leading Enterprise Revenue Platform based in Sunnyvale, California, has been recognized as a winner of the prestigious 2024 Deloitte Technology Fast 500™ award. The company has secured its position as the top enterprise revenue platform, marking a significant achievement in the industry.

news.headline: Analyst predicts Solana and Toncoin to hit new all-time highs like Bitcoin, with SOL 8% away from $263.21 and TON 15% below $8.25. Both have strong fundamentals.
news.summary: An influential cryptocurrency analyst highlighted Solana (SOL) and Toncoin (TON) as potential contenders to achieve new all-time highs. JA Maartunn, known for insights at CryptoQuant, pointed out that Solana was just 8% away from its peak of $263.21, emphasizing it as a standout. Additionally, Toncoin was mentioned as trailing closely at 15% below its all-time high of $8.25. Maartunn noted the strong fundamentals supporting both projects, including active development teams and networks. He suggested that based on these factors, it is likely that these coins could follow Bitcoin's trajectory in the near future.

T-Mobile's CEO expresses confidence in full-year guidance at UBS conference, citing strong Q4 season and robust switching opportunities.
news.summary: T-Mobile's CEO, Mike Sievert, recently spoke at the UBS Global Media and Communications Conference, engaging in a fireside chat with UBS's John Hodulik. During the discussion, Sievert conveyed optimism regarding the company's full-year guidance. He highlighted expectations of a solid performance in the holiday Q4 season and emphasized that the trend of customers switching to T-Mobile remains strong, presenting significant growth potential. Sievert also mentioned that the company anticipates meeting its targets for the full year in terms of postpaid phone net additions.
